nasb.text: On the right hand their brood arises; They thrust aside my feet and build up against me their ways of destruction.

esv.text: On my right hand the rabble rise; they push away my feet; they cast up against me their ways of destruction.

cnv.text: 一窩暴民在我右邊興起， 推開我的腳，築起災難的路攻擊我。

ccb.text: 这些无赖从右边攻击我， 迫使我逃亡， 他们展开攻势要毁灭我。
